items.name: Noir Blossom Lace Suit
items.description:
Bold, sleek and striking — the Midnight Lace Bodysuit wraps the body in deep black floral lace with a flawless silhouette.
Its detailed texture blends elegance with a dark, seductive vibe, making it perfect for high-fashion looks, gothic glamour, alt fits, or chic night-out outfits.
A statement piece that transforms any avatar into pure aesthetic power.

🔗 GMARI: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=GMARI&CreatorType=Group

items.name: 💗 SIUNES Graphic Zip Hoodie Pink Baddie Edition
items.description:
Cropped zip hoodie in glossy soft pink, designed with bold SIUNES graphics, edgy typography, and statement artwork details. The shiny fabric finish combined with expressive prints creates a confident baddie aesthetic with a modern streetwear twist. Feminine, bold, and unapologetically stylish — made for standout fits and confident looks.

items.name: Vintage Pink Splash Varsity Jacket – Pinky Teddy
items.description:
Perfect for anyone who’s into fashion, pastel aesthetics, kawaii style, or simply wants a jacket that really stands out in Roblox.
✨ Details
Crafted with a premium varsity fabric look and realistic stitched texture
Unique pink paint–splash artwork on the sleeves
Textured varsity patches and embroidered badge accents
Open-front design for layering your favorite outfits
Designed to look great on every avatar
Ideal for streetwear fits, school-inspired outfits, and soft–aesthetic looks
